home.loginTitle: Unikaj kosztownych błędów przy zakupie auta.
home.loginBody: Wklej szczegóły ogłoszenia, wiadomości sprzedawcy, link z Otomoto albo zdjęcia. Otrzymaj uporządkowaną analizę ryzyka AI przed kontaktem ze sprzedawcą.
home.loginDisclaimer: To tylko wstępna analiza wspierana przez AI. Zawsze sprawdź dokumenty i umów profesjonalne oględziny przed zakupem.
home.heroBody: Wklej treść ogłoszenia, wiadomości od sprzedawcy, link z Otomoto, zdjęcia, VIN albo własne pytania. AutoVerdict przygotuje uporządkowaną analizę ryzyka AI, zanim skontaktujesz się ze sprzedawcą.

previewConcerns.sellerDetails: Opis sprzedawcy zawiera za mało szczegółów

home.recommendedNextStep: Poproś o VIN, faktury i historię szkód przed oględzinami.

paste.title: Wklej to, co wiesz
paste.desc: Dodaj treść ogłoszenia, odpowiedzi sprzedawcy, VIN, notatki, zdjęcia albo link z Otomoto.

review.title: AI analizuje ryzyka
review.desc: AutoVerdict sprawdza brakujące informacje, podejrzane sformułowania, ryzyka transakcji i typowe problemy modelu.

nextSteps.title: Otrzymujesz praktyczne kroki
nextSteps.desc: Dostajesz pytania do sprzedawcy, punkty do oględzin, szacowane koszty i jasną rekomendację.

home.audienceBody: AutoVerdict jest dla prywatnych kupujących, którzy nie są ekspertami motoryzacyjnymi i chcą uporządkowanej drugiej opinii przed telefonem do sprzedawcy, oględzinami albo wydaniem pieniędzy na ryzykowne ogłoszenie.
home.safetyTitle: Narzędzie do wstępnej oceny, nie gwarancja.
home.safetyBody: AutoVerdict pomaga wskazać pytania i ryzyka. Nie zastępuje diagnostyki, weryfikacji prawnej, oficjalnych raportów historii pojazdu ani niezależnych oględzin.
home.seoTitle: Analiza ogłoszeń aut używanych AI dla kupujących w Polsce
home.seoBody: Zakup auta używanego w Polsce zwykle oznacza porównywanie ogłoszeń, sprawdzanie deklaracji sprzedawcy, historii serwisowej i ocenę, czy auto warto oglądać. AutoVerdict pomaga analizować ogłoszenia z Otomoto i inne informacje od sprzedawcy, wskazując możliwe ryzyka, braki, praktyczne pytania i punkty do oględzin.
home.seoWhyTitle: Po co analizować ogłoszenie przed kontaktem ze sprzedawcą?
home.seoWhyBody: Kontakt w sprawie problematycznego ogłoszenia zabiera czas obu stronom. Szybka analiza AI pomaga odsiać oczywiste ryzyka przed telefonami i oględzinami.
home.seoInfoTitle: Co sprawdzić przed zakupem auta używanego?
home.seoInfoBody: Historia serwisowa, szkody, spójność przebiegu, dokumenty importowe, wiarygodność sprzedawcy i typowe problemy modelu to ważne sygnały przy ocenie ogłoszenia.
home.seoOtomotoTitle: Jak AutoVerdict pomaga z ogłoszeniami Otomoto
home.seoOtomotoBody: Wklej link do ogłoszenia Otomoto albo skopiowaną treść. AutoVerdict czyta zawartość, wykrywa braki, oznacza podejrzane wzorce i podaje praktyczne pytania przed decyzją o oględzinach.

footer.label: Footer navigation
footer.description: AI-assisted used-car listing risk reports for private buyers across Europe.

home.title: AutoVerdict - AI Used-Car Listing Analysis Before You Buy
home.description: Paste a used-car listing, seller messages, VIN, notes, or photos. AutoVerdict gives you a structured AI risk report with red flags, missing information, seller questions, inspection points, and a clear next step.
home.ogTitle: Check a used-car listing before you contact the seller
home.ogDescription: AutoVerdict helps private buyers screen used-car listings, spot risks, and prepare seller questions before inspection.

how.title: How AutoVerdict Works
how.description: Learn how AutoVerdict turns used-car listings, seller messages, notes, VIN details, and photos into structured AI risk reports.

sample.title: Sample Used-Car AI Risk Report - AutoVerdict

pricing.title: AutoVerdict Pricing - Used-Car AI Risk Reports

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - AutoVerdict
privacy.description: Learn how AutoVerdict handles account data, submitted vehicle information, uploaded images, AI processing, payments, and reports.

terms.title: Terms of Use - AutoVerdict
terms.description: Read the AutoVerdict terms of use, including product limitations, AI report disclaimer, credit rules, and user responsibilities.

contact.title: Contact AutoVerdict
contact.description: Contact AutoVerdict for questions about used-car listing analysis, reports, payments, or product support.

hero.eyebrow: Built for private used-car buyers across Europe
hero.title: Check a used-car listing before you contact the seller.
hero.body: Paste a marketplace listing, seller messages, VIN, vehicle notes, or photos. AutoVerdict gives you a structured AI risk report with red flags, missing information, seller questions, inspection points, and a clear next step.
hero.trust: AI-assisted preliminary screening. Not a replacement for professional inspection.
hero.free: First analysis is free. No card required.

public.inputsTitle: Use whatever information you already have.
public.inputsLead: AutoVerdict can work with a full listing or partial information. The report clearly shows what is known and what still needs verification.

listing.title: Marketplace listing
listing.body: Paste a used-car listing URL or copied ad text from the marketplace you are browsing.

messages.title: Seller messages
messages.body: Add claims about service history, accident history, ownership, import status, or recent repairs.

details.title: Vehicle details
details.body: Add VIN, registration details, mileage, price, first registration date, or vehicle history notes.

photos.title: Photos and screenshots
photos.body: Upload listing screenshots, exterior photos, interior photos, dashboard photos, or document screenshots.

public.checksTitle: What AutoVerdict checks before you spend time on a car.
public.checksLead: The report focuses on practical buying risks: missing documents, unclear claims, suspicious wording, ownership signals, model-specific areas to verify, and questions to ask before inspection.

missing.title: Missing information
missing.body: Highlights missing VIN, service records, ownership details, accident history, import status, or unclear seller claims.

claims.title: Risky claims
claims.body: Flags unsupported statements such as accident-free, full service history, first owner, or urgent sale wording.

costs.title: Cost signals
costs.body: Points out areas that may create first-year ownership costs and should be checked before inspection.

questions.title: Seller questions
questions.body: Turns risk signals into practical questions you can send before calling or travelling.

checklist.title: Inspection checklist
checklist.body: Gives concrete items to verify if the car reaches viewing or mechanic inspection stage.

recommendation.title: Clear next step
recommendation.body: Summarizes whether to proceed, request more information, inspect carefully, or avoid the listing.

reportPreview.title: Structured report preview

items.claim: Accident-free claim is not supported by documents

reportPreview.next: Ask for VIN, service invoices, accident history, and ownership documents before arranging inspection.
reportPreview.disclaimer: AI-assisted screening, not a professional inspection.

public.samplePreviewTitle: See what the report looks like.
public.samplePreviewLead: AutoVerdict returns a structured decision report, not a generic chat transcript.
public.stepsLead: A simple flow for turning messy listing information into a practical buyer checklist.

submit.title: Submit what you know
submit.body: Paste listing text, seller messages, vehicle notes, VIN, or photos.

analyze.title: AutoVerdict screens risks
analyze.body: The AI pipeline extracts facts, identifies missing data, and organizes practical risk signals.

act.title: Decide the next step
act.body: Use seller questions, inspection points, and recommendation to decide whether the car is worth your time.

public.chatbotTitle: Why not just use a generic chatbot?
public.chatbotLead: AutoVerdict is designed around the used-car buying workflow.

chatbot.genericBody: You must design the prompt, structure the answer, remember safety limits, and convert output into questions yourself.
chatbot.autoBody: The product produces a repeatable report with risk categories, missing information, seller questions, checklist, and cautious recommendation.

public.pricingLead: Buy checks only when you need them. One completed report uses one credit. Credits are not a subscription and there is no monthly fee.

one.title: 1 check
one.body: For one extra car you want to verify before taking the next step.

three.title: 3 checks
three.body: For comparing several cars after your free first analysis. Better value for comparing multiple cars.

pricing.freeBody: New users get 1 free analysis after sign-in. No card required.
pricing.creditRule: One completed report uses one credit.
pricing.safetyNote: Credits are intended for completed reports. Technical failures should not cost you an additional check.

public.safetyTitle: A screening tool, not a guarantee.
public.safetyLead: AutoVerdict does not replace professional vehicle inspection, official history reports, mechanic diagnostics, legal verification, or independent expert evaluation.
public.seoTitle: Used-car listing analysis for cautious buyers.
public.seoLead: Use AutoVerdict before contacting the seller, booking inspection, or travelling to view a car. The report helps you spot red flags, request evidence, and compare listings more calmly.

replaceInspection.a: No. It is preliminary AI-assisted screening that helps you prepare before professional inspection.

marketplaces.q: Does AutoVerdict work only with one marketplace?
marketplaces.a: No. You can paste listing text, seller messages, VIN details, notes, or screenshots from different marketplaces. Automatic URL extraction may depend on marketplace support, but manual input can still be analyzed.

credits.a: One completed report uses one credit. Credits are stored in your account and are not a subscription.

chatbot.q: Is this better than asking a generic AI chatbot?
chatbot.a: AutoVerdict is built around the used-car buying workflow. It organizes the result into risk level, missing information, seller questions, inspection checklist, model-specific things to verify, and a clear recommendation.

partialInfo.q: Can I use AutoVerdict if I only have photos or seller messages?
partialInfo.a: Yes. You can submit partial information such as screenshots, seller replies, VIN details, vehicle notes, or copied listing text. The report will show what is known and what still needs verification.

beforeTravel.q: What should I check before travelling to view a used car?
beforeTravel.a: Before travelling, you should clarify the VIN, ownership history, service records, accident history, import status, mileage consistency, and whether the seller can provide documents. AutoVerdict helps turn these points into practical seller questions and inspection items.

safeToBuy.q: Can AutoVerdict tell me if a car is safe to buy?
safeToBuy.a: No. AutoVerdict is a preliminary screening tool. It can highlight risks, missing information, and questions to ask, but it cannot guarantee that a car is safe. Always verify documents and use professional inspection before purchase.

notExpert.q: Is AutoVerdict useful if I am not a car expert?
notExpert.a: Yes. AutoVerdict is designed for private buyers who want a structured second opinion before contacting the seller, travelling to view the car, or booking an inspection.

finalCta.title: Found a car you like? Check it before you call.
finalCta.body: Spend a few minutes screening the listing before you spend hours messaging, travelling, or booking inspection.
finalCta.free: Start with 1 free analysis. No card required.

howPage.title: From listing details to a structured buyer report.
howPage.lead: AutoVerdict organizes the information you already have into facts, risks, missing details, seller questions, inspection points, and a practical next step.
howPage.outputLead: A structured markdown report with clear sections, risk labels, evidence notes, checklist items, and a cautious recommendation.

samplePage.title: Sample AutoVerdict report
samplePage.lead: This example uses realistic but generic vehicle information. It is not about a real seller or real VIN.

vehicle.title: Vehicle summary
vehicle.body: 2021 Volvo XC60, diesel, 84,000 km. Listing information is partial and needs document verification.

riskSignals.title: Risk signals
riskSignals.body:
- Service history is incomplete
- Import history requires clarification
- Accident-free claim is not backed by documents

missing.title: Missing information
missing.body: Request VIN, service invoices, accident-history evidence, ownership documents, and recent diagnostic records.

questions.title: Questions for the seller
questions.body: Can you send the VIN? Do you have service invoices? Was the car imported? Has any bodywork been repaired?

checklist.title: Inspection checklist
checklist.body:
[ ] Verify VIN and documents
[ ] Check mileage consistency
[ ] Inspect paint thickness
[ ] Test cold start and transmission
[ ] Compare claims with invoices

recommendation.title: Recommendation
recommendation.body: Request more information before arranging a paid inspection or long trip. If documents are provided and the seller accepts independent inspection, the listing may still be worth checking.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: This report is AI-assisted preliminary screening based only on submitted information. It does not replace professional inspection or official history verification.

pricingPage.title: Simple pricing for used-car checks.
pricingPage.lead: Use credits to generate structured AI risk reports before contacting sellers, booking inspections, or travelling to view a car.
pricingPage.creditsBody: One completed report uses one credit. Credits are stored in your account and can be used when you submit a car for analysis. Credits are not a subscription.

who.title: Who we are
who.body: AutoVerdict provides AI-assisted used-car listing risk reports for private buyers.

data.title: What data we collect
data.body: We may collect account data, submitted vehicle information, uploaded files, payment events, and generated reports.

use.title: How we use your data
use.body: We use data to authenticate users, process checks, generate reports, manage credits, and provide support.

ai.title: AI processing notice
ai.body: Information submitted for analysis may be sent to the configured AI provider to generate the report.

files.title: Uploaded files and vehicle information
files.body: Uploaded images and reports are not public by default. Avoid submitting unnecessary personal or sensitive information.

payments.title: Payments
payments.body: Payment processing may be handled by external payment providers according to their own terms.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.body: Authentication data is used to identify your account and protect access to your reports.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.body: Data may be retained while your account is active and as needed for product operation or legal obligations.

deletion.title: Data deletion requests
deletion.body: You can contact support to request deletion of account data where applicable.

security.title: Security
security.body: We use reasonable technical measures for an MVP, but do not claim compliance certifications.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Contact support@example.com for privacy questions. This is a temporary placeholder address.

description.title: Product description
description.body: AutoVerdict provides AI-assisted preliminary screening reports for used-car purchase decisions.

disclaimer.title: AI-assisted screening disclaimer
disclaimer.body: AutoVerdict does not replace professional vehicle inspection, official vehicle history reports, mechanic diagnostics, legal verification, or independent expert evaluation.

guarantee.title: No guarantee of vehicle condition
guarantee.body: Reports may contain errors or miss information. They are not guarantees that a vehicle is safe or suitable.

responsibility.title: User responsibility
responsibility.body: You remain responsible for purchase decisions and should verify all important claims independently.

credits.title: Credits and payments
credits.body: One completed analysis uses one credit. Credits are used for report generation and are not exchanged for cash unless required by law or payment-provider rules.

refund.title: Refund and technical failure handling
refund.body: If a technical error prevents report generation, the credit is not consumed or can be restored according to product rules.

acceptable.title: Acceptable use
acceptable.body: Do not submit illegal, harmful, unrelated, or unnecessary sensitive information.

account.title: Account access
account.body: You are responsible for keeping access to your account secure.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: The service is provided as an MVP decision-support tool and liability is limited to the extent permitted by law.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Contact support@example.com for terms questions. This is a temporary placeholder address.

contact.title: Contact AutoVerdict
contact.lead: Have a question about a report, payment, or the product? Send us a message.
contact.placeholder: Placeholder support address until the final support mailbox is configured. Response time target: 1-2 business days.

reportIncludes.title: What you get in the report
reportIncludes.lead: AutoVerdict turns messy listing information into a structured buyer report you can use before calling the seller, travelling to view the car, or booking an inspection.

risk.title: Risk level and confidence
risk.body: Understand whether the listing looks low, medium, high, or unknown risk.

facts.title: Extracted vehicle facts
facts.body: See the key facts AutoVerdict found in the listing or user-provided data.

missing.title: Missing information
missing.body: Know what is not provided but should be clarified before inspection.

signals.title: Risk signals
signals.body: Review suspicious wording, unsupported claims, unclear ownership, import or accident-history ambiguity.

questions.title: Seller questions
questions.body: Get practical questions you can send before calling or travelling.

checklist.title: Inspection checklist
checklist.body: Use concrete inspection points if the car reaches viewing or mechanic stage.

model.title: Model-specific things to verify
model.body: See common areas to check for the specific model, engine, year, or configuration when available.

recommendation.title: Clear recommendation
recommendation.body: Proceed, proceed with caution, request more information, or avoid.
